commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=d3e614c89c675c4f1fd4afbc42f2e4102d331a95)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes gateway probe budget resolution so configured and explicit remote targets receive the full caller timeout, with helper and command regression tests.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +19. Total +22 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. current source shows non-loopback configRemote probes are capped at 1500ms and the command path passes that budget into probeGateway. I did not run the live remote WSS environment, but the source path and linked report make the bug reproducible from code inspection.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR needs contributor or maintainer revision for the inactive-config timeout regression and real behavior proof; automation should not take over while the proof gate is unmet.

target.title: fix(gateway): honor configured remote probe budgets
target.body:
## Summary
- honor the caller timeout budget for configured remote and explicit remote gateway probes
- keep the shorter ssh tunnel cap unchanged
- cover both the helper budget split and the `gateway probe` command path with regression tests

Fixes #65355.

## Proof

### Behavior addressed
`openclaw gateway probe --timeout <n>` still capped `configRemote` probes at `1500ms`, so a healthy remote gateway could false-negative even when the caller supplied a larger budget.

### Real environment tested
- Targeted Vitest coverage for the command path that wires `gateway probe --timeout` into `probeGateway()`
- Source-level regression coverage for the exact `configRemote` and `explicit` budget calculation

### Exact steps or command run after this patch
Current HEAD: `d3e614c89c675c4f1fd4afbc42f2e4102d331a95`

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs   src/commands/gateway-status/helpers.test.ts   src/commands/gateway-status.test.ts
```

### Evidence after fix
- `resolveProbeBudgetMs(15000, { kind: "configRemote", ... })` now returns `15000`
- `resolveProbeBudgetMs(15000, { kind: "explicit", ... })` now returns `15000`
- ssh tunnel probes still cap at `2000`
- `runGatewayStatus(..., { timeout: "15000" })` now passes `timeoutMs=15000` to a configured remote target

### Observed result after fix
```text
[test] passed 2 Vitest shards in 18.96s
Test Files  2 passed
Tests       42 passed
```

### What was not tested
- I did not rerun the reporter's live macOS-to-remote WSS environment end to end in this workspace.
target.author: alix-007
